{{ $page := .page }} {{ $truncate := .truncate | default 0 }} {{ $thumb := $page.Params.thumbnail }} {{ $thumbURL := cond (and $thumb (hasPrefix (printf "%s" $thumb) "/")) ($thumb | relURL) $thumb }} {{ $desc := cond (ne (default "" $page.Description) "") ($page.Description) ($page.Summary | plainify) }}
{{ if $thumb }} {{ end }}

{{ $page.Title }}

{{ if and $truncate (gt $truncate 0) }}{{ $desc | truncate $truncate "…" }}{{ else }}{{ $desc }}{{ end }} date {{ $format := $page.Site.Params.date_format | default "2006-01-02" }} {{ $d := $page.PublishDate }}{{ if $d.IsZero }}{{ $d = $page.Date }}{{ end }} {{ if $d.IsZero }}{{ with $page.File }}{{ $d = time (substr .ContentBaseName 0 10) }}{{ end }}{{ end }} {{ $d.Format $format }}
